title: R-v2 Adversarial Isolation
blocked_reason: Infrastructure precondition failure in the scheduled-task environment, two independent issues, both fatal to the per-session commit+push loop. (1) NO PUSH CREDENTIALS: no credential.helper, no ~/.git-credentials, no SSH key at ~/.ssh, no gh CLI, no GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN env. git push origin main fails with: could not read Username for https://github.com. The v0.3.0 + Sprint-3a-setup commits reached origin only via a manual push from the user's own machine; this sandbox has never had push auth. (2) MOUNT DENIES DELETE: rm in the repo returns EPERM (Operation not permitted). git commits still SUCCEED via rename-based index update, but each leaves a stuck .git/*.lock (index.lock, HEAD.lock, objects/maintenance.lock) that blocks the next git op until renamed aside, plus uncleanable .stuck.* cruft. ACTION NEEDED before re-enabling: (a) provide push credentials to this environment, either a PAT wired through a credential helper, or an SSH key plus switching origin to git@github.com:GGHongyi/us-equity-research.git; (b) ideally grant delete permission on the repo mount so git can clean its own lock files. After fixing, set blocked=false and the next run starts Item 1 fresh. No Item 1 deliverables were written this session. Local commits from this session (3c2c64f 'in progress' + the block commit) are on the user's machine but UNPUSHED; the user should verify origin/main after restoring auth.

us-equity-research/references/phase-3-valuation-us.md (R-v2 section update)
us-equity-research/references/phase-2-continuation-us.md (A-Consensus output structure note)
items.commit_message: Sprint 3a Item 1: isolated R-v2 subagent spawn pattern + 5-point attack methodology documentation
items.session_notes: Session 1 (2026-05-30T06:03Z) halted at the in-progress stage before any substantive work. Root cause is environmental, not the item spec: git push has no credentials in this sandbox, and the repo mount denies unlink so git leaves stuck *.lock files after every write. Local commits work via rename but cannot reach origin. Reset to pending; after the user restores push auth and clears blocked, this item re-runs cleanly. See blocked_reason for the full diagnosis and remediation steps.
